name: ai-router-contracts
description: ZK Proof Registry smart contracts for AI Router (Base Sepolia)

scripts.compile: if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node ]; then export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH"; fi; hardhat compile
scripts.test: if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node ]; then export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH"; fi; hardhat test
scripts.deploy:local: if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node ]; then export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH"; fi; hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node ]; then export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH"; fi; hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network baseSepolia
scripts.verify: if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node ]; then export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH"; fi; hardhat verify --network baseSepolia
